'''√dh-d-n''' ('''kadhadan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:curd|curd]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-d-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:curd|curd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √dh-d-n
|-
! Lemma
| kadhadan
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thidhadan || jidhadan || shidhadan || kidhadan
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthudhadan || jujudhadan || shushudhadan || kukudhadan
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thudhadan || judhadan || shudhadan || kudhadan
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thudhadan || judhadan || shudhadan || kudhadan
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thedhadan || jedhadan || shedhadan || kedhadan
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothodhadan || jojodhadan || shoshodhadan || kokodhadan
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thodhadan || jodhadan || shodhadan || kodhadan
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thodhadan || jodhadan || shodhadan || kodhadan
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhadan || dhadan || dhadan || dhadan
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhadan || dhadan || dhadan || dhadan
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhadan || dhadan || dhadan || dhadan
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhadan || dhadan || dhadan || dhadan
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thædhadan || jædhadan || shædhadan || kædhadan
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathadhadan || jajadhadan || shashadhadan || kakadhadan
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thadhadan || jadhadan || shadhadan || kadhadan
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thadhadan || jadhadan || shadhadan || kadhadan
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shadhadan
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshadhadan
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishadhadan
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shadhadannü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshadhadannknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishadhadannü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shadhadanshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshadhadannkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishadhadanshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shadhadanro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshadhadannkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishadhadanro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shadhadanmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshadhadannkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishadhadanmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shadhadansher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshadhadannksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishadhadansher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shadhadanng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshadhadannkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishadhadanng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shadhadanya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshadhadannkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishadhadanya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shadhadanyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshadhadannkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishadhadanyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shadhadannüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshadhadannknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishadhadannüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhadannüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhadannknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhadannüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shadhadannümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhadannknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhadannümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shadhadanshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshadhadannkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishadhadanshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhadanshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhadannkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhadanshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shadhadanshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhadannkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhadanshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shadhadanronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshadhadannkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishadhadanronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shadhadanroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshadhadannkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishadhadanroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shadhadanromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhadannkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhadanromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shadhadanmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshadhadannkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishadhadanmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shadhadanmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshadhadannkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishadhadanmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhadanmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhadannkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhadanmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
